title: UNO

notes:
Install lutris 
=> install uplay via lutris website 
=> install steam via uplay running in lutris wineserver (by clicking play on uno, it will start to install steam)
=> play uno  after logging in to steam
=> wait for game to crash
=> popup warning you to play without the uplay overlay
=> play without uplay overlay
=> succes!

now since this laptop has no decent gfx card in it it runs very laggy since apparantly a card game can be very graphically intensive. 
anyway, it runs and its playable !

good luck y'all !
title: UNO

notes:
Uplay in-game overlay has to be disabled in Uplay settings for the game to not freeze nor crash . 
tested full match with bots, smooth FPS, fast loading and clear sounds

Note: tested UNO DEMO
Note2: always disable Uplay in-game overlay for all Ubisoft games
